title: Professional Summary
content: Ved Vaiwala is a Software Developer with 1.5+ years of experience in backend development, web APIs, enterprise software solutions, cloud-native applications, CI/CD automation, and AI-powered web applications. He specializes in ASP.NET Core, C#, SQL Server, REST APIs, Firestore, and Google Cloud Platform.

title: Backend Skills
content: Ved has hands-on experience with C#, ASP.NET Core Web API, REST APIs, CQRS, Entity Framework Core, and MVC architecture. He has built backend systems, enterprise APIs, and scalable web applications.

title: Frontend Skills
content: Ved works with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and TypeScript to create responsive web applications and user interfaces.

title: Cloud Skills
content: Ved has experience using Google Cloud Platform including Firestore, Cloud Storage, and Cloud Run. He deploys cloud-native applications and manages cloud infrastructure.

title: Tools
content: Ved uses Git, GitHub, Postman, Google AI Studio, GitHub Actions, Firestore, and containerized deployment workflows.

title: Implementation Consultant
content: Ved works as an Implementation Consultant at Thoughtspark. He analyzes client requirements, configures business rules, designs workflows, implements UI configurations, builds data models, and supports role-based authorization systems.

title: .NET Developer
content: Ved worked as a .NET Developer at Kombee. He led development of Philips SmartConnect backend modules, enhanced Exxon Mobil enterprise platforms, participated in Agile ceremonies, and developed scalable systems using MVC architecture.

title: Personal Portfolio Platform
content: Ved built a full-stack portfolio platform using React, TypeScript, ASP.NET Core Web API, Firestore, Google Cloud Run, Google Cloud Storage, and GitHub Actions.

title: AI Assistant
content: Ved integrated an AI-powered chatbot into his portfolio platform. The chatbot answers questions about his experience, skills, projects, and professional background.

title: Cloud Architecture
content: The portfolio platform uses Firestore for analytics, Cloud Run for backend hosting, and Cloud Storage for frontend hosting. It follows cloud-native deployment practices.

title: CI/CD Implementation
content: Ved implemented automated deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions for both frontend and backend cloud deployments.

title: EBookStore
content: Ved developed an Amazon-style online bookstore using C#, ASP.NET MVC, MySQL, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features included authentication, shopping cart functionality, book listings, and admin management.
Bachelor of Science in Information Technology from Veer Narmad South Gujarat University.
Master of Science in Information Technology from Veer Narmad South Gujarat University.
Completed the Generative AI for Everyone certification.
Ved has professional experience designing, developing, and maintaining REST APIs using ASP.NET Core Web API and enterprise backend architectures.
Ved has experience deploying applications to Google Cloud Run, managing Firestore databases, hosting assets in Cloud Storage, and building cloud-native solutions.
Ved has practical experience implementing CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and automated deployment workflows.
Ved has worked with Google AI Studio and built AI-powered web applications including a portfolio chatbot assistant.
Ved is actively building expertise in Cloud Engineering, DevOps, and Generative AI with a focus on scalable systems, automation, and modern software architecture.
